revision.comment: Moving from [[Category:20th-century monks]] to [[Category:20th-century monks by religion]] Diffusing per [[WP:DIFFUSE]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia categories
fixing the uncategorized categories error
Adding [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Kk]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:1 revision imported]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:1 revision imported]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:Https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (1 members)
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
Bot: remove obsolete category Categories with 1 members
Bot: remove obsolete category Confirmed enwiki categories
Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Uncategorized categories
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q30616340)
Bot: remove [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (has wikidata link)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "{{draft categories|↵}}" to ""
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{Navseasoncats}}
{{Portal|Religion}}
{{CatAutoTOC}}
{{wikidata link|Q30616340}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[en:Category:20th-century Buddhist monks]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:20th-century Buddhists|Monks]]
[[Category:20th-century monks by religion|Buddhist]]
[[Category:Buddhist monks by century]]
[[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] (crud category cleanup) [[git:Emma-Leonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/22542364787|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:

{{Navseasoncats}}
{{Portal|Religion}}
{{CatAutoTOC}}
{{wikidata link|Q30616340}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[en:Category:20th-century Buddhist monks]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:20th-century Buddhists|Monks]]
[[Category:20th-century monks by religion|Buddhist]]
[[Category:Buddhist monks by century]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=20th-century_Buddhist_monks here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
<!--templates-->
{{Navseasoncats}}
{{Portal|Religion}}
{{CatAutoTOC}}
{{wikidata link|Q30616340}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[en:Category:20th-century Buddhist monks]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:20th-century Buddhists|Monks]]
[[Category:20th-century monks by religion|Buddhist]]
[[Category:Buddhist monks by century]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments; consolidate 1 interlanguage link(s) into wikidata link template [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/25113759987|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
